failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result, which showed one matching available beginner Jigsaw Puzzle priced at $46.13, and incorrectly answered that no items matched.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify available beginner Jigsaw Puzzles costing more than $45.76. The correct tool call was made and returned one matching item with price 46.13. At index 4, the Executor had the relevant tool output but synthesized the opposite answer, saying no items match. This contradicts the tool result and was not resolved later; the Evaluator also approved the incorrect answer.
